title: Vibranium Process
description: A new mineral following the Netherite, used to craft new gear for a better experience!
body:
# This is a very lightweight project that adds a new mineral, Vibranium, without modifying too much of the original.
- Note: I am not a native English speaker, so I apologize for any inaccuracies in some of the translations.
- 如果你是中国玩家，那么太棒了，我提供了汉化版本可供下载！
- Details:
- You can use Vibranium to craft more advanced equipment, which are more powerful in every way than the lower world alloy equipment
- ![They have higher values and even 100% knockback resistance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43e13c1150593d9686fa5d88b4e2fa6e44f0d7e5.png)
- ![Higher attack speed and damage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6982e504e3ba8f3249a29729b87d697f21fe047.png)
## As powerful as they are, you'll still have to go through these processes in Survival Mode to get them
- First, you'll have to acquire the upgrade template, and I've provided a synthesis recipe for making it
- ![That's it, it's simple isn't it?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a2c7b553cc7221425c8fb0a47695e46e08d17fb.png)
- Subsequently, you need to make chrome
- ![A material created to aid in the creation of Vibranium.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8592e390d72fa7a764d59dcc378f8887ea822dfa.png)
- Put the chrome in the stone cutter as well as the furnace, and you'll get the regular stencil and the chrome cube, respectively
- ![This is the normal template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c86695bdc0e483f4c5d77912057a7020a3c5e906.png)
- ![It's a chrome cube.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3fbba24d7b285705acd18e7111ca688d8dd17a6.png)
- The normal template and the upgraded template are then placed together to form the Vibranium template.
- ![Yeah, that's it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5a85b7ae24ad847a3506844f62dc3b9a2abf664.png)
- Remember the chrome cube? Now, place it on the ground and find a way to destroy it!
- Want to try digging with a pickaxe? No, it's hardened to 200 and you may need to dig for a long time
- ![Want to try digging with a pickaxe? No, it's hardened to 200 and you may need to dig for a long time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92039e695c62892f94b2792ba579cdca257cf428.png)
- You thought of TNT right? But it has a full 1500 resistance!
- ![You thought of TNT right? But it has a full 1500 resistance!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68b6cff39ea59f7f6036a75d399edc31aeff3018.png)
- So the best thing to do is to use ...... piston!
- ![So the best thing to do is to use ...... piston!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c3af3a386eb379cc6bcf2348d50c96dbab74509.png)
- Now, unsurprisingly you get Vibranium with a gorgeous progress note!
- ![Complete the challenge!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b63d642885ff07776c8ec2979f93f44ade554315.png)
- Finally, Vibranium equipment can be created by placing the Vibranium and the template into the Forge!
- ![Yeah, that's it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d7c6ae41dd2ee699664eaa4fd234c16f68986cc.png)
- That's right! Upgraded equipment should be iron equipment not diamond equipment
- ![outfit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/558be397d70f0eaf243fa33da8de5905b2cad29c.png)
### other than
- If you have any good suggestions, feel free to drop me a line via email: xzm5749@163.com
